- `nums[0...p]` **严格** 递增，
- `nums[p...q]` **严格** 递减，
- `nums[q...n − 1]` **严格** 递增。

**输出:** true

- `nums[2...4] = [5, 4, 2]` 严格递减 (`5 > 4 > 2`)。
- `nums[4...5] = [2, 6]` 严格递增 (`2 < 6`)。

**示例 2:**

**输入:** nums = [2,1,3]

**输出:** false

**解释:**

无法选出能使数组满足三段式要求的 `p` 和 `q` 。

- `3 <= n <= 100`

def solve(nums)
  n = nums.length
  (1..(n-3)).each do |p|
    (p+1..(n-2)).each do |q|
      valid = true
      # Check first part: 0..p is strictly increasing
      (0..p-1).each do |i|
        if nums[i] >= nums[i+1]
          valid = false
          break
        end
      end
      next if !valid

      # Check second part: p..q is strictly decreasing
      (p..q-1).each do |i|
        if nums[i] <= nums[i+1]
          valid = false
          break
        end
      end
      next if !valid

      # Check third part: q..n-1 is strictly increasing
      (q..n-2).each do |i|
        if nums[i] >= nums[i+1]
          valid = false
          break
        end
      end
      if valid
        return true
      end
    end
  end
  false
end

-module(trionic).

solve(nums) ->
    N = length(nums),
    check_p_q(N, nums).

check_p_q(N, nums) ->
    P_list = lists:seq(1, N-3),
    lists:foldl(
        fun(P, Acc) ->
            Q_list = lists:seq(P+1, N-2),
            lists:foldl(
                fun(Q, Acc2) ->

check_parts(P, Q, nums) ->
    N = length(nums),
    First = lists:sublist(nums, 1, P+1),
    case is_increasing(First) of

            case is_decreasing(Second) of

                    case is_increasing(Third) of

is_increasing(List) ->
